DialogueSystem
Table of Contents

Class OptionNode

Namespace
WolverineSoft.DialogueSystem.Editor

class for options attached to choice dialogue nodes or redirects. Handles logic for displaying node options from redirect weights, option parameters, and option fields.

[Serializable]
public class OptionNode : BlockNode, IDialogueNode, IDataNode<DialogueObject>
Inheritance
object

Implements
IDialogueNode
IDataNode<DialogueObject>
